---
title: Debusschere, musée Rodin
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784712997/debuscherrerodin_20180607_dmjpl4.png
description: Reproduction du tableau du musée Rodin de Debusschere
categories: ["generalillustration"]
date: 2018-06-06
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784712997/debuscherrerodin_20180607_dmjpl4.png)
